raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Mohsus aizinaja Jo- 
sui/ un fazzija us winnu preeksch 
wiffu Israêlu: Stiprinajes/ un 
turrajs drohfschu Prahtu / jo tu 
ce-eefi ar fscheem Kaudim us to 
Semini/ ko tas KUNGS wix- 
nu Tehweem swehrejs irr win- 
neem doht/ un tew buhs winneem 
to par Zhpaſchunu tsdalliht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tas KUNGS nu irr tas/ 
kas tawa Preefscha eet / wiꞥsch 
tew ne atstahs/ nedg tew pamet- 
tihs/ ne bihstees/ un ne baiſojees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Mohsus usrakstiia to 
Baufliu/ un deive to teen Pree- 
stereem Lewja Dehleem / kas ta 
KUNGA Derribas Schkirstu 
neffe / un wiffem Israêta Wez- 
zajeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Mohsus patwehſeja 
teem/un fazzija: Ap feptitu Gad- 
du ta nofazzita Atlaifchanas Lai- 
ka/ us Leewenu Swehtkeem/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad wiff Israêls nahks 
rahditees preeksch ta KUNGA 
tawa Deewa / tai Weeta / ko 
wiꞥsch isredsehs / buhs tew scho 
Baufli preeksch wiffu Israêlu 
isfaikt/preeksch winnu Ausim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Sapulze tohs Kaudis/tohs 
Wihrus / un tahs Seewas / un 
tohs Behrnians/ un tawu Swe- 
fchineeku / kas tawas Wahrtis 
irr/ka tee dsird/un ka tee mahzahs/ 
un bihstahs to KUNGU tawu 
Deewu / un turr / un darra wi- 
fus fchihs Bauflihas Wahrdus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ka winnu Behrni/ kas 
to ne finna/ dsird un mahzahs to 
KUNGU juhsu Deewu bihteês/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "wiffas Deenâs / ko juhs dfihwo 
feet wirs tahs Semmes/ us fur 
ren juhs pahr to Jardann ejat 
winnu ermantoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS fazztia 
us Mohsu: Redsi taws Laiks ir 
atnahzis / ka tew jamirst/ aizina 
Josui/un stahweet Sa-eeschana 
Telti / ka es winnam pawehſtu 
Ta gahje Mohsus un Josuiis / un 
tee stahweja Sa-eeschanas Telti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad rahdijahs tas KUNG 
tai Telti Padebbes-Stabbâ/ un 
tas Padebbes-Stabs stahweja 
Sa-eeschanas Telts Durwju 
Wirtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS fazztia 
us Mohsu: Redsi / tu gulleſt a 
taweem Tehweem / un fshee Lau 
dis zelsees un dfihs Manztbu tah 
Semmes sweſcheem Deeweem 
pakkat / us kurren tee nahk win- 
nas Widdû/un atstahs mann/ un 
pamettihs mannii Derribu / ko e 
ar teem ejmu darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad apskaitifees mann 
Bahrsiba prett teem tai Deena 
un es atstahschu tohs/ un patſehp 
schu mannii Waigu no winxeem 
ka tee aprichti tohp/ un dauds Lau 
nums un Behdas winxeem uhs 
ees/ka tee tai Deena fazztis: Wu 
fchis Lannuns tapehz man us 
gahjis / ka mans Deews mannii 
Widdû ne irr?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet es patſehpschu saw 
Waigu tai Deena wiffa Launn 
ma deht / ko tee irr darrijschi/ ka 
tee pee zittceem Deeweem irr no 
greesuschees.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
